description: Subclass of dict returns None instead of raising KeyError and ignores dict storage.
reasoning: LookupDict inherits from the built-in dict class but violates the base class contract by overriding __getitem__ to return None for missing keys instead of raising a KeyError. Furthermore, it shifts lookup from the dictionary's actual hash table storage to the instance's __dict__, meaning items added via standard dictionary setters are ignored by the getter, breaking fundamental substitutability for the dict type (Refused Bequest smell).

description: Mimic class raises NotImplementedError for a standard interface method.
reasoning: MockRequest is designed to substitute for a urllib.request.Request object when interacting with http.cookiejar. By raising NotImplementedError on the standard add_header method, it violates the contract of the interface it mimics. A subtype or substitute should not be less functional than its base, as this causes runtime crashes in code expecting the full interface (Refused Bequest smell).

description: Subclass overrides method to set a different header than its parent.
reasoning: HTTPProxyAuth inherits from HTTPBasicAuth but its __call__ implementation sets the 'Proxy-Authorization' header instead of the 'Authorization' header. This breaks the behavior expected from a subtype of HTTPBasicAuth; a caller expecting the parent's contract (populating the standard Authorization header) will find the program state incorrect after substitution (Refused Bequest smell).
